2605.08436.title: A meshfree exterior calculus for generalizable and data-efficient learning of physics from point clouds
2605.08436.paper_summary: We introduce a meshfree exterior calculus (MEEC) for learning structure-preserving descriptions of physics on point clouds, and use it to build MEEC-Net, a data-efficient surrogate that transfers across resolutions, geometries, and physical parameters. MEEC equips an $\varepsilon$-ball graph with virtual node and edge measures via a single sparse Schur complement solve; the resulting complex satisfies discrete conservation exactly, is end-to-end differentiable in the point positions, and exposes a direct geometry-to-physics link without the mesh-generation step required by conventional structure-preserving discretizations. MEEC-Net learns unknown physics as a shared edge-wise flux law in an SO($d$)-invariant local frame, so the same kernel produces compatible fluxes on any point cloud whose features lie in the training range. We prove a solution-error bound that splits into discretization and kernel-approximation terms which is independent of problem geometry, explaining the observed transfer from very few examples. We show that single-solution training transfers to unseen geometries, boundary conditions, and physical parameters. On five canonical PDE benchmarks MEEC-Net achieves 1-2 orders of magnitude lower out-of-distribution error than baseline neural-operator approaches. On the SimJEB structural-bracket benchmark it achieves competitive error while using substantially fewer training geometries.
2605.08436.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了一種無網格外部微積分（MEEC），用於學習點雲上物理的結構保持描述，並利用它構建了MEEC-Net，一種數據高效的替代模型，能夠在不同解析度、幾何形狀和物理參數之間進行轉換。MEEC通過單次稀疏的Schur補充解決方案，為$\varepsilon$-球圖配備了虛擬節點和邊緣度量；所得到的複雜體恰好滿足離散守恆，並且在點位置上是端到端可微分的，還直接揭示了幾何到物理的聯繫，而不需要傳統結構保持離散化所需的網格生成步驟。MEEC-Net在SO($d$)不變的局部框架中學習未知的物理作為共享的邊緣流量法則，因此相同的核能在任何特徵位於訓練範圍內的點雲上產生兼容的流量。我們證明了一個解錯誤界限，該界限分為離散化和核近似項，並且與問題幾何形狀無關，解釋了從極少數例子中觀察到的轉移。我們顯示單一解的訓練可以轉移到未見的幾何形狀、邊界條件和物理參數。在五個經典的PDE基準測試中，MEEC-Net的分佈外錯誤比基準神經運算子方法低1-2個數量級。在SimJEB結構支架基準測試中，它在使用顯著更少的訓練幾何形狀的同時達到了具有競爭力的錯誤。
2605.08436.author: Benjamin D. Shaffer et.al.
2605.08436.authors: Benjamin D. Shaffer, Brooks Kinch, M. Ani Hsieh, Nathaniel Trask
